pokemon:chi-yu.name: Chi Yu
pokemon:chi-yu.summary: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.
The envy accumulated within curved beads that sparked multiple conflicts has clad itself in fire and become a Pokémon.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.

form:chi-yu.name: Chi Yu
form:chi-yu.summary: Chi Yu form with Dark / Fire typing.
expansionNotes: Location and breeding metadata can be expanded with a fuller encounter import.
breedingNotes: Breeding notes are pending a richer source import.
